titleStmt.title: SII 25.121: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 121. (A.R. No. 121 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the first prākāra in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The record is dated in Śaka 1460, Viḷambi, Āshāḍha śu 12, Tuesday, Mūla-nakshatra, Māhēndra-yōga, Bāla-Karaṇa, Chātūrmāsya-vratamahāpuṇyakāla day corresponding to 1538 A.D., July 9.

It records the grant of wet and dry lands at Kīḻainilai alias Bhanavanallūr, part of Mañjālaippaṟṟu, in Poṉṉamarāpati-nāḍu in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu as dēvadāṉa for the worship and services to the deity Bhairava in the temple of Āṇḍapiḷḷaiy-nayiṉār of Tirupputtūr, a brahmadēya in the same vaḷanāḍu, by Periyarāmappa-nāyakkar, son of Golla-Basava-nāyakkar of Aṇṇaṉ-ēndal and who is described as svāmidrōharagaṇḍan, for the merit of the king. It is stipulated that in two instalments (kandāyam) 40 poṉ per year as nattak-guttagai and the taxes like kāṇikkai, pariśaṭṭam, nall-erudu and naṟ-paśu should be collected from out of the gift lands. The boundaries of the gift lands are specified. Among these mention may be made of the field called Māṉābharaṇaṉ, a dēvadāṉa of the deity Kailāya-nayiṉār, Nelliśśai Tuvaramaṅgala-maṇṇāṇi-vāḻaikkuḍi, paraiyar-ppuravu, etc.

The donor Periya Rāmappa-nāyakkar may be identified with his namesake who figures in a record of Śaka 1462 (= 1540 A.D.), which also refers to the division Poṉṉamarāpati-nāḍu to which the grant village Vēlaṅguḍi-puravu is included. It may be said that the chief Rāmappanāyakkar of the present record is different from his namesake who figures in three other inscriptions dated Kollam 725 (A.R.Ep., 1916, No. 119), Kollam 727 or Śaka 1473 (Ibid., No. 428) and Śaka 1457 (Ibid., 1905, No. 129).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu svastiśrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvaran harirāyara vibhāḍan bhāṣaikkuttappuvarāyaragaṇḍan kaṇṭanāṭu koṇṭu koṇṭa nāṭu kuṭātāṉ pūṟuva dakṣiṇa paścimottara catussamudrādhipati śrī virapratāpa A
ccutadevamahārāyar pṛthvirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāniṉṟa śakā[bdam 10 4]6 10 Itanmeṟcellā niṉṟa viḷambi samvat(samvat)sarattu dakṣaṇāyanattu gilīṣtharitu Āṣāḍa māsattu pūrvvapakṣattu ndvādaśiyum maṅgaḷavāramum mula nakṣattramum
māhendrayogamum bālavakaraṇamum peṟṟa cāturmāsya pratha mahāpuṇyakālattu nāḷ svāmidroharagaṇḍan Aṇṇaṉental goḷla basavanāyakkar kumāra periya Irāmappa nāyakkar svāmi Accutadeva mahārāyaṟku puṇya
māka keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan=tirupputtūr Āṇṭapiḷḷaiy nayiṉār bhairavarkku Iṉṉāṭṭu poṉṉamarāpati ṉāṭṭu māñcālaippaṟṟil piṟivukiḻai nilaiyāṉa bhairavanallūṟku kiḻpāṟkellaiyāvaṉa śrī kailāya nayiṉār
tevatāṉam māṉa māṉāparaṇaṉ vayalukkum tiruvin=taṉūrṟi nilental Ellaikkum teṉpāṟkellai nelluc ceytuvarum maṅkala maṇṇāṇi pāḻaikkuṭi tuttiyeri paṉaimpaḷḷam Uṭpaṭṭa paṟṟil muṉṉāḷ Iṉṉāyiṉār paḻantevatāṉa
m mukkūṟu nikki niccayittappaṭi nālat toṉṟu Uṭpaṭavum melpāṟkellai Araiyaṉ tencikaramaṉ vaṭatiramaṉ Uṭpaṭṭa paṟṟi miṟaippuravu nikki kiḻ nilappuravukku nāṭṭuk kaṇakku Oḻukiṇpaṭi Uṇṭā ṉapaṟṟu miraivayalil
kiḻai nilaiyār kāṇiyāṭcikku nāṭṭuka nila vaṭapāṟkellaiyāvaṉa teṉṉavaṉ paraiyar puravukku Oḻukaikku tekkūm Āka vicaitta perunāṉ kellaikkuḷ paṭṭa nañcai puñcai
lil tevatāṉamāka bhairavaṟku pūcai tiruppaṇikku viṭṭa
paṭiyāle nattak kuttakaiyāka varuṣam Oṉṟukku Iṟuk
kum cakkaram poṉ nāṟppatu Intap poṉ nāṟpatu yiraṇṭu kantā
yamāka Iṟukka kaṭavārkaḷākavum nālu koyilukku vuṟṟa kāṇik
kai veccaṉucari caṭṭamum nallerutu naṟpacuvumiṟukka kaṭavārākavum
dānapālanayo(ḥ) rmmadhye dānāt greyonu pālanam .
dānātsvarga mavāpnoti pālanādacyutam padam . svadattā
t dviguṇam puṇyam paradattānu pālanam . paradattāpahā
reṇa svadattam niṣphalam bhavet .
Digital edition of SII 25.121 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
